intended_rule: Reduce 5 NVDA when downside protection is triggered and the 210-212 reclaim fails.
actual_execution: A filled sell of 5 shares at displayed price 201.74 reduced NVDA from 20 to 15 shares.
account_risk_improvement: Core-position exposure was reduced by 25 percent and U.S. cash improved.
short_term_price_outcome: The execution price was near the intraday low and NVDA later closed around 208.
execution_price_context: An imperfect execution price does not invalidate a triggered downside-protection rule.
review_conclusion: NVDA execution was rule-compliant despite imperfect short-term price outcome.
lessons_learned: Rule compliance and fill quality require separate fields.
The remaining 15 shares stay under 200 downside protection and 210-212 reclaim monitoring.
next_rule_update: Hold 15; reduce another 5 below 200 with weak QQQ/SMH; hold after a sustained 210-212 reclaim; no buyback yet.
